name: Redmi 10C
notes:
1. Xiaomi bootloader unlock requires the official Mi Unlock Tool and a Mi account with at least 7 days wait.
2. Apply for unlock at https://www.mi.com/global/service/miui/unlock — approval may take up to 30 days.
3. Bootloader unlock WILL wipe all user data — back up first.
4. OrangeFox recovery is not available for this device; use TWRP only.
5. This is an A-only (non-A/B) device — slot management is not required.

edl_entry_methods: Method 1 (Key Combo): Power off device. Hold Vol DOWN + Vol UP, then connect USB.
Method 2 (ADB, if partially booting): adb reboot edl
Method 3 (Mi Flash Tool): Use Xiaomi's official Mi Flash Tool to enter EDL automatically.
IMPORTANT: Xiaomi EDL access may require a signed programmer; unsigned programmers are blocked on newer devices.
